description:
The SizeOverLifetimeStartEnd component makes particles in a particle system change size as their lifetime duration progresses.

This component is part of the Photon Dust system made by Frooxius.

fields.StartSize: The size particles will have at the beginning of their lifetime.
fields.EndSize: The size particles will have at the end or their lifetime.

usage: Attach to a slot, add to the list of modules in a ParticleSystem, and adjust the values to make the desired effect from this component.
